title: Proclamation No. 1706, s. 1978
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1706

RESERVING FOR LOCAL AND NATIONAL GOVERNMENT OFFICES AND HOUSING PROJECT SITES PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CANTILAN, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, ISLAND OF MINDANAO

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in my by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for local and national government offices and housing project sites purposes under the administration of the respective local and national government agencies concerned subject to private rights, if any there be, and upon prior consultation with the municipal government of Cantilan, to subdivision survey and allocation to be made in accordance with the development plan to be prepared by the Department of Local Government and Community Development, with respect to government sites; and to subdivision survey and development by the National Housing Authority, with respect to the housing project, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the said municipality, province of Surigao del Sur, island of Mindanao, which is more particularly described as follows:

Lot 2864 Cantilan Cadastre Cad-354-D, Case 3 (Mun. Gov’t. of Cantilan)

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 2864 of the cadastral survey of Cantilan and shown on plan Ap-18262, L.R.C. Cad. Record No. ______), situated in the Poblacion, Municipality of Cantilan, Province of Surigao del Sur.

Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2, by Lot 2845; along line 2-3, by Lot 2743; on NE. and NW., along lines 3-4-5, by Lot 2742, all of Cantilan cadastre; on the SW., along line 5-6, by Burgos Street; along lines 6-7-8, by lot 2322; on the NE. and NW., along lines 8-9-10, by Lot 2744; on the NW., along line 10-11, by Lot 2858; on the NE., along line 11-12, by Lot 2859; along line 12-13, by Lot 2860; on the SE., along lines 13-14, by Lot 2746; on the SE., NE., and NW., along lines 14-15-16-17, by Lot 2745; on the NW., along lines 17-18, by Lot 2746; on the NE., along line 18-19, by Lot 2861; along 19-20, by Lot 2862; on the NE., NW., along lines 20-21-22, by Lot 2863;  all of Cantilan cadastre; on the SW., along line 22-23, by Orillanida Street; on the NW. and SW., along lines 23-24-25, by Lot 2920; on the NW., along line 25-26, by Lot 2917; along line 26-27, by Lot 2916; along line 27-28, by Lot 2915; on the N., along line 28-29, by Lot 2914; on the NE., along line 29-30, by Lot 2913; on the N., along line 30-31, by Lot 2912; on the NE., along line 31-32 by Lot 2911; on the N., along line 32-33, by Lot 2910; on the NE., along line 41-42, by Lot 2749; on the NE., E., SE., along lines 42-43-44-45-46-47, by Sabang River; on the SW., along line 47-48, by Lot 2715; along line 48-49, by Lot 2714; along line 49-50, by Lot 2711; along line 50-51, by Lot 2710; along line 51-52, by Lot 2709; along line 52-53, by Lot 2708; along line 53-54, by Lot 2707; along line 54-55, by Lot 2706; along line 55-56, by Lot 2705; along line 56-57, by Lot 2704; along line 57-58, by Lot 2703; along line 58-59, by Lot 2702, all of  Cantilan cadastre; on the W., along line 59-60, by Orozco Street; on the NW., and SW., along lines 60-61-62 by Lot 2115 on the SW., along line 62-63, by Lot 2699; along line 63-64, by Lot 2829; on the NW. and SW., along lines 64-65-66, by Lot 2825; on the SW., along line 66-67, by Lot 2966; on the NW., along line 67-68, by Lot 2818; along line 68-69, by Lot 2819; along line 69-70, by Lot 2820; on the NE., along line 70-71, by Lot 2823; along line 71-72, by Lot 2824; on the SE., NE., along lines 72-73-74, by Lot 2747; on the NE., and NW., along lines 74-75-76, by Lot 2748, all of Cantilan cadastre; on the SW., along line 76-77, by Urbiztondo Street;  on the NW. and SW., along lines 77-78-79, by Lot 2831; on the W. and SW., along line 79-80-81, by Lot 2832; on the NW., along line 81-82, by Lot 2835; along line 82-83, by Lot 2836; along line 83-84, by Lot 2837, all of Cantilan Cadastre; on the N., along line 84-85, by Arellano Street; on the NW. and SW., along lines 85-86-87, by Lot 2736; on  the NW., along line 87-88, by Lot 2839; on the W., along line 88-89, by Lot 2840; along line 89-90, by Lot 2841; along line 90-91, by Lot 2842; along line 91-92, by Lot 2843; and on the W., along lines 92-93-1 by Lot 2844, all of Cantilan cadastre.

Beginning a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 55 deg 51’E., 79.18 m. from B.L.L.M., 1, Cantilan Cad;

thence N. 27 deg. 30’E., 3.01 m. to point 88; thence N. 12 deg. 43’E., 7.23 m. to point 89; thence N. 25 deg. 20’E., 8.79 m. to point 90; thence N. 38 deg. 23’E., 9.57 m. to point 91; thence N. 17 deg. 56’E., 9.12 m. to point 92; thence N. 77 deg. 28’W., 0.09 m. to point 93; thence N. 0 deg. 06’E., 6.12 m. to the point of beginning. Containing an area of EIGHTY THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED EIGHTEEN (80,418) SQUARE METERS.

All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: points 43, 44, 45, by Stakes, and the rest by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.

Bearings true.

Date of the Cadastral Survey, February 1, 1961 – December 31, 1961.  This Lot was prepared under Plan Ap-18262, which was approved on June 16, 1967.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 20th day of January, in the year of Our Lord, Nineteen hundred and seventy-eight.

(SGD . )FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) JACOBO C. CLAVE Presidential Executive Assistant

Source: CDAsia
